prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Mercedes-Benz OM662 2.9L turbo-diesel (engine code: 662.911)** with a **Garrett GT2260V turbocharger** (modified compressor wheel for 1.5 bar boost), paired with a **Bosch CP3 high-pressure fuel pump** and **Siemens 2000cc/min injectors** for 220hp and 450Nm torque at the wheels. Custom **ECU remap via Alientech KESSv2** with a **diesel particulate filter (DPF) delete** and **EGR bypass** for optimized airflow.

Full **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **Milltek Sport** (mandrel-bent, 409-grade stainless) with a **Scorpion 4-inch oval rear silencer** and **de-catted downpipe** to reduce backpressure. **Intercooler upgrade to a GReddy Type-S front-mount** (550x225x76mm core) with **custom piping** to eliminate heat soak in the stock location.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valving for the Actyon Sports’ 1,600kg weight), **polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 90D durometer)** for the front control arms and rear trailing arms, and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)** to reduce body roll. **Brembo GT 345mm 4-piston front brake kit** (adapted from a **Mercedes-Benz W203 C55 AMG**) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Motul RBF660 brake fluid** for fade-resistant stopping power.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB04 widebody kit** (custom-fabricated to fit the Actyon Sports’ unique chassis dimensions) with **carbon fiber fender flares** and **extended rocker panels** to accommodate **20x10.5 ET15 front and 20x12 ET20 rear wheels** (staggered fitment). **Custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** with **gloss black accents** on the grille, mirrors, and roof.

**Seibon carbon fiber hood** (custom-made for the Actyon Sports’ clamshell design) with **functional NACA ducts** to direct airflow to the **GReddy intercooler**. **Rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny** (modified to fit the Actyon’s rear bumper) with **dual 3.5-inch exhaust exits** and **LED strip lighting** integrated into the diffuser’s underside.

**Custom interior roll cage** by **Custom Cages UK** (T45 steel, 3.2mm wall thickness) with **Sparco Pro ADV seats** (fixed-back, 6-point harnesses) and **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm diameter, suede). **Full Alcantara headliner and door cards** with **red stitching**, **AEM X-Series digital dash** (replacing the stock cluster), and **Pioneer AVH-Z5200DAB head unit** with **Focal Utopia Be tweeters** and **JL Audio 12W7 subwoofer** in a **custom sealed enclosure** under the rear seat.
